issues.title: TextField adding new line when shift modifier not pressed (macOS)
issues.body:
Issue on desktop-embedding, running a project for macOS. No combination of TextInputAction's provides the expected behaviour for creating new lines.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `flutter create bug`.
2. Add a TextField with a textInputAction of either TextInputAction.done or TextInputAction.newline
3. Press enter without holding shift, a new line is created. Press enter with holding shift, a new line is also created. 

**Expected results:** New line is only created when the shift modifier key is held.

**Actual results:** New line is created regardless of modifier keys. Only TextInputAction.unspecified does not create a new line, but then it does not handle modifier keys either.

issues.title: Keyboard letters (sdfe) are imposible to press in some Mac-Safari Web Apps
issues.body:
## Steps to Reproduce


Just run any 

 just create any flutter app and run it in Safari and try to type those letters (sdfe) in a: 
 TextFormField(),
 TextField(),

It doesn't work in any of those.

My Safari version is: 15.0 (16612.1.29.41.4, 16612)
My OSx version is: BigSur 11.6 (20G165)

I'm running this in a Mac mini M1, But this problems also appears in a MacBook Air With intel Processor. 

It doesn't happens in every computer. A coworker has the same computer (Mac mini M1) and same safari version and the problem doesn't tend to happens to there. 

You can check my dev repository here https://mydev.hicoapp.com that is using 2  TextFormField() to login, using flutter Channel stable 2.5.2. But the problem didn't appear in http://mydevdev.hicoapp.com where I was using a previous version of flutter:

issues.title: iOS - The app crashes when entering data into an input field in the WebView
issues.body:
### Steps to reproduce

I have an issue on iOS when using webview_flutter. After users tap on an input field in the WebView and start typing, the app crashes. Currently, TestFlight provides a crash file, which I have mentioned below.This issue occurs randomly on some devices.

This issue occurs when I use Flutter 3.22.3 and webview_flutter: 4.8.0.

### Expected results

No crash happen

### Actual results

Crashed report from tesflight

### Code sample

Thanks for the update. I am unable to replicate the reported behavior with given details after running the provided code on iphone 6s device and also on iphone 15 simulator. Based on the report and crash log, I will keep the issue open for team's tracking.

```
1   UIKit                         	0x0000000228a1c450 __65+[UIFocusRingManagerAccessibility moveRingToFocusItem:forClient:]_block_invoke + 68 (UIFocusRingManagerAccessibility.m:237)
2   UIAccessibility               	0x00000001a6d0e690 -[NSObject(AXPrivCategory) accessibilityEnumerateAncestorsUsingBlock:] + 76 (NSObjectAccessibility.m:11352)
3   UIKit                         	0x0000000228a1c2d0 +[UIFocusRingManagerAccessibility moveRingToFocusItem:forClient:] + 324 (UIFocusRingManagerAccessibility.m:236)
4   UIKit                         	0x0000000228acc38c __88-[UITextInputUIResponderAccessibility _axDrawFocusRingAroundFirstResponderAndMoveFocus:]_block_invoke + 348 (UITextInputUIResponderAccessibility.m:974)
5   libdispatch.dylib             	0x000000019359d13c _dispatch_call_block_and_release + 32 (init.c:1530)
```
Looks related to an accessibility feature being on `UIFocusRingManagerAccessibility`. Maybe https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/focus-and-selection ? 

@binhdi0111 since you were able to reproduce this given the attached recording, what accessibility features are on?  Does it reproduce if the accessibility feature is off?

@jmagman I can confirm that all accessibility features are in their default state, and I resolved this issue by commenting out the line import 'package:webview_flutter_android/webview_flutter_android.dart' as webview_flutter_android during CI/CD.

> @jmagman I can confirm that all accessibility features are in their default state, and I resolved this issue by commenting out the line import 'package:webview_flutter_android/webview_flutter_android.dart' as webview_flutter_android during CI/CD.

Are you sure that's the same crash as the one you attached the stacktrace for?  The crashing thread is clearly in an accessibility call, and it doesn't seem possible that importing `webview_flutter_android` would manifest a crash there.  Maybe you're seeing two different things?
@jmagman When I encountered this issue, I also checked the accessibility features, and everything was set to default. I will try to reproduce it and get back to you with a recording.
Were you able to reproduce and collect the crash log without the focus ring accessibility feature on?
@jmagman Up until now, I have not been able to reproduce it.

@anhnv-rabiloo I see you added a 👍  are you also seeing a crash when entering data into an input field in a webview?  If so, could you share your crash log?  It's hard to figure out what's going on when the crash doesn't match the description, and definitely I don't know what could be going on if "I resolved this issue by commenting out the line import 'package:webview_flutter_android/webview_flutter_android.dart' as webview_flutter_android during CI/CD."  (webview_flutter_android would have nothing to do with a crash like this on iOS?)
